title: lantana rehmannii
intro: Lantana rehmannii, also known as yellow lantana or lantana montana, is a flowering plant species belonging to the verbena family. The medicinal properties of Lantana rehmannii include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of consuming Lantana rehmannii include relief from respiratory issues, fever reduction, and wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Lantana rehmannii can be used in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
